# createOrgPrincipal

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for createOrgPrincipal

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useCreateOrgPrincipalMutation(); mutate({ input: { bypassStepUp: '<Boolean>', isReadOnly: '<Boolean>', name: '<String>', orgId: '<UUID>', useAdminOwner: '<Boolean>' } });
```

## Examples

### Use useCreateOrgPrincipalMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useCreateOrgPrincipalMutation();
mutate({ input: { bypassStepUp: '<Boolean>', isReadOnly: '<Boolean>', name: '<String>', orgId: '<UUID>', useAdminOwner: '<Boolean>' } });
```
